description: Submit a proposed action plan (actions + optional initialInput and data wiring). The server validates and caches the plan, then returns a planId. Use that planId when calling execute after user approval. Never call transaction-only tools directly; discover them via list_actions.

initialInput.description: Optional initial data for the chain. Actions can reference via inputsFrom with $initial.fieldName.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions. Each action: id (unique), tool (from list_actions or model_evaluation), optional arguments, optional inputsFrom ($prev.<actionId>.<path> or $initial.<path>).

planId.description: Use this when calling execute after user approval.

presentation.description: Human-friendly summary of the approved plan for UI display.

body.description: Detailed description of what the plan will do and whether data will be modified.

steps.description: High-level description of each step in the plan.

tool.description: Underlying MCP tool name for this step.

effect.description: Primary effect of the step, e.g. read, write, delete, plan.

effects.description: Aggregate booleans indicating whether the plan reads, writes, or deletes data.

dataAccess.description: List of high-level data fields or domains accessed by this plan, such as contacts:name or tags:name.
